title: Accessibility

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the source MD; CI regenerates this file.

body: Don't create one-off font sizes. If your design needs a size between tokens, first check whether a token can be used, then raise it as a proposed token addition.

items: 11px is only acceptable for non-essential UI
Use defined type styles (avoid light weight)
Maintain readable line height and spacing
Text line length is 544px at max with 16px text
Text line length is 480px at max with 14px text
Text line length is 424px at max with 12px text
Avoid long blocks of dense text
